title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes:
I played the offline single player game. Initially I had a black screen upon exiting the cut scenes. I unchecked vsync, light bloom, flare and the UI became available. I quit the game and started it again and then played for the next 30 minutes without issue.

The game is not very performant given my system, but its playable at ~45FPS with no shadows and no water details
title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes: I played on Medium settings. Played the intro campaign and a few minutes afterwards and there is no more black screen error. During the campaign I got around 45~ FPS average, during the actual game I got around 60-70. So definitely playable. There are some frame drops/quick lags but overall it's playable might be able to fix that with better specs/ticking something off like bloom. Overall, game is playable again and no black screen error. Not sure if due to proton or Wolcen update or a bit of both but regardless, we're back in business.
title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes: Works perfectly. Getting 60 fps but sometimes it can stutter. Quite the improvement from last time where it was just a blank screen

notes: I play in Offline mode everything was fine. 50-60 fps during cinematic and play (high settings everywhere and SMAA 2TX with the game restarted). Only one issue is sometimes when you skip cinematic the screen goes black with the minimap and menu visible.
title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes: Works perfectly without need for any tweaks!
title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes: Game was playing great just couple of days ago - getting 60fps in most areas with high settings , not sure if there was an update or not but now only running with esync disabled will work and have no graphical corruption . If i run with Esync enabled eg default settings i get a black screen in the game with colour bleeding (menus are ok).  Unfortunately this has a large performance impact ( ~ 20-30% ) and hence the stuttering is a lot worse than prior . Tried older kernels , older drivers , reinstalling the game and its still the same result.
title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes: Ok its back to great again - after all the colour bleeding black screen issue i was having , i restarted in windows 1080p mode and this time with esync enabled , this time i had minor graphical corruption , namely half of my character was not shown but everything else was perfect . After a cut scene the full character was shown and i played for 2 hours more and it was flawless. Hopefully it stays this way.
title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes:
I tried playing without PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command% and the game is far more "performent" on the splash screen and the initial game selection. With the above option, the game is 'useable' but even with my specs I can only seem to achieve ~24fps regardless of the settings. The game stutters when several enemies appear from the ground and graphics at points appear to be floating (i.e. there is space between the sword and the sheath)

Without the option enabled, the game seems to get around ~70-80FPS but the UI in game suffers from severe colour bleed and the main window is completely black, thus making the game unplayable

title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem

notes:
Game ran perfectly well out of the box, played several hours, exited out of it, played again but next day I believe I got 'color' issue with the UI, basically character and environment were black but UI elements were visible and had color distortion.

This problem was fixed by going into Properties, then click on Set Launch Options and type following: PROTON_NO_ESYNC=1 %command%
This will enable esync and game runs smoothly with it.

I would like to point out that I tried using following setting: PROTON_USE_WINED3D=1 %command% like many have suggested, however FPS drop was bad, playable but can get you killed if you are not careful, it was somewhere between 15 and 30, enabling esync solved color distortion and FPS remained unaffected.

Last note, after character is selected and you press that "Play the game button", loading time is insanely long, not sure if this happens on Windows as well but only at this time this happens, in other parts of the game loading is fast.
title: Wolcen: Lords of Mayhem
